parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: Allows you to specify which primitives or group of primitives to resample. Accepts patterns, as described in .

parameters.name: lod
parameters.label: Level of Detail
parameters.description: If the geometry you are performing this operation on is made up of something other than polygons (e.g. a NURBS circle), this parameter determines how detailed the conversion to polygons will be. The h

parameters.name: edge
parameters.label: Resample by Polygon Edge
parameters.description: This toggle allows the resampling to be done on a per-edge basis of the polygon rather than on the polygon as a whole. This means that corners will be preserved in the resampling. When this parameter

parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Method
parameters.description: Specifies how the geometry is segmented.

parameters.name: measure
parameters.label: Measure
parameters.description: Specifies how to measure along curved spline sections.

parameters.name: dolength
parameters.label: Maximum Segment Length
parameters.description: When this option is enabled, it overrides the value of the Arc/Chord length and allows you to specify your own values for the length of the segments in the resampled geometry. Smaller values produce s

parameters.name: length
parameters.label: Length
parameters.description: This parameter lets you specify the length for the resampled geometry.

parameters.name: dosegs
parameters.label: Maximum Segments
parameters.description: When enabled, allows you to override the maximum number of segments used in the resampled geometry.

parameters.name: segs
parameters.label: Segments
parameters.description: Lets you specify the number of segments used when measuring along arc.

parameters.name: last
parameters.label: Maintain Last Vertex
parameters.description: If selected, the primitive's final CV is included in the resampled polygon, even if the final resulting edge is shorter then the given segment length.
